reference.purpose: Defines how the agent operates as a ResearchOps developer.

obligations.obligation: Read the existing implementation before changing it.
State material assumptions, implementation-critical ambiguity and tradeoffs before coding.
Prefer full coherent files when the user requests full rewrites.
Use narrow commits when repository tooling requires smaller writes.
Avoid speculative features, abstractions, configurability and adjacent refactors.
Define success criteria and validation before claiming completion.
Explain risks, validation and follow-up work honestly.
